meta_title: For Freelancers: client workflow to Solve stuck with basic apps (Intermediate Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to client workflow and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Client Workflow to Solve Stuck with Basic Apps
content.seo_description: Stop building basic apps. Master a professional client workflow using Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver high-end, scalable software for your clients.
content.answer_block: Break through the 'basic app' ceiling by shifting from manual coding to an AI-orchestrated modular architecture. By integrating Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative refinement, you standardize your output, reduce build times by 70%, and deliver production-ready, enterprise-grade applications that command premium freelance rates.
content.intro:
You’ve been here before: the project starts with excitement, but quickly devolves into a spaghetti-code mess that feels amateur. You’re trapped in the cycle of building basic, unscalable apps that keep your hourly rate low and your stress levels high. Clients don't want 'scripts'; they want robust systems that solve real business problems.

It’s time to stop hacking and start engineering. By adopting an AI-driven workflow that combines the structural precision of Antigravity with the cognitive reasoning of Claude Code, you transform from a struggling freelancer into a high-velocity product architect. This is how you ship professional-grade software while everyone else is still debugging their boilerplate.

steps.title: Architectural Scaffolding
steps.description: Define the project core using Antigravity to ensure a modular, scalable directory structure from the first commit.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a production-ready SaaS scaffold for a Next.js 14 application with Supabase integration, including clean architecture patterns and modular services.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'initialize project structure based on provided architectural blueprint'

steps.title: Database Schema Definition
steps.description: Use AI to normalize your database schema, ensuring relational integrity that prevents technical debt later.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a relational database schema for a multi-tenant SaaS application. Include tables for users, organizations, subscriptions, and audit logs.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate prisma schema based on the approved database design'

steps.title: API Layer Implementation
steps.description: Automate the creation of type-safe API routes to ensure seamless frontend-backend communication.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create RESTful API endpoints for user authentication and CRUD operations for the core business entity, ensuring TypeScript type safety.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement API controllers and validate against schema'

steps.title: UI Component Library Integration
steps.description: Rapidly deploy high-fidelity components that maintain a consistent design system across the entire application.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a reusable UI component library using Tailwind CSS and Radix UI primitives, focusing on accessibility and responsive design.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'scaffold dashboard components using the established design system'

steps.title: Automated Testing Suite
steps.description: Implement an automated testing layer to ensure your client deployments are bulletproof.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate integration tests for the authentication and primary business logic flows using Playwright and Vitest.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'write and execute test suites for all implemented features'

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'Context Manifest' file that Claude Code can read to understand the entire app state before suggesting changes.
Use Antigravity to generate documentation comments for every function; it forces the AI to understand the logic before writing code.
Treat your AI interactions as code reviews: if the output looks messy, ask the AI to refactor for 'clean code principles' before committing.
Standardize your environment variables and config files across all client projects to reduce cognitive load when switching contexts.
Run Claude Code in 'diff mode' to manually approve every architectural change, preventing the AI from hallucinating unwanted dependencies.
content.next_steps: Once you have successfully scaffolded your first project, focus on building a personal library of 'Antigravity Blueprints' that you can reuse across multiple client engagements to maximize your profit margins.
content.conversion_block: Stop building basic apps and start shipping professional software that stands the test of time. Leverage this workflow to double your output and triple your client satisfaction. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
